debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
⊢ inner ℂ x (a y) =
    (toComplexMeasure (@toResolutionOfIdentity H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha) x y).integral
      ⇑(Function.Embedding.subtype (spectrum ℂ a))

failed_attempts:
simpa using (by

simpa using (toComplexMeasure_integral_subtype_eq_inner (E := toResolutionOfIdentity ha) (a := a)

simpa using (SpectralThm.spectralDecomposition (a := a) ha x y)

simpa using (by

      simpa using this))
simpa using (spectralDecomposition (a := a) ha x y)
simpa using (toComplexMeasure_integral_id (E := toResolutionOfIdentity ha) (x := x) (y := y))
simpa using (toComplexMeasure_integral_subtype_eq_inner (E := toResolutionOfIdentity ha) (a := a) ha x y)

simpa using (toComplexMeasure_integral_subtype_eq_inner (E := toResolutionOfIdentity ha) (a := a)
    (ha := ha) x y)

simpa using (by
